sentences.target: Ich helfe jeden Tag im Haushalt.

translations.de: Ich helfe jeden Tag im Haushalt.
translations.en: I help with the household every day.
translations.es: Ayudo en la casa todos los días.
translations.fr: J'aide à la maison tous les jours.
translations.it: Aiuto in casa tutti i giorni.
translations.ru: Я каждый день помогаю по дому.
translations.pt: Eu ajudo em casa todos os dias.
translations.he: אני עוזר בעבודות הבית כל יום.
translations.tr: Her gün ev işlerine yardım ederim.
translations.vi: Tôi giúp việc nhà mỗi ngày.
translations.ar: أساعد في أعمال المنزل كل يوم.
translations.nl: Ik help elke dag in het huishouden.
translations.hi: मैं रोज़ घर के कामों में मदद करता हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω με τις δουλειές του σπιτιού κάθε μέρα.
translations.nb: Jeg hjelper til hjemme hver dag.
translations.id: Saya membantu pekerjaan rumah tangga setiap hari.
translations.sv: Jag hjälper till hemma varje dag.
translations.ro: Ajut la treburile casei în fiecare zi.
translations.ja: 毎日家事を手伝っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; main predicate.
Determiner in accusative singular masculine; part of temporal expression ‘jeden Tag’.
Noun; head of the temporal NP ‘jeden Tag’, functioning adverbially.
Contracted preposition + definite article (‘in dem’); introduces a dative prepositional phrase.
Masculine noun; dative singular governed by ‘im’.

sentences.target: Unser Haushalt ist klein und ruhig.

translations.de: Unser Haushalt ist klein und ruhig.
translations.en: Our household is small and quiet.
translations.es: Nuestro hogar es pequeño y tranquilo.
translations.fr: Notre foyer est petit et calme.
translations.it: La nostra casa è piccola e tranquilla.
translations.pt: Nossa casa é pequena e tranquila.
translations.vi: Nhà mình nhỏ và yên tĩnh.
translations.nl: Ons huis is klein en rustig.
translations.hi: हमारा घर छोटा और शांत है.
translations.pl: Nasz dom jest mały i spokojny.
translations.el: Το σπίτι μας είναι μικρό και ήσυχο.
translations.nb: Hjemmet vårt er lite og rolig.
translations.sv: Vårt hem är litet och lugnt.
translations.ro: Casa noastră este mică și liniștită.
translations.cs: Náš domov je malý a klidný.
translations.da: Vores hjem er lille og roligt.
translations.ja: うちは小さくて静かです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine modifying ‘Haushalt’.
Masculine noun; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate adjectives.
Predicate adjective describing ‘Haushalt’.
Coordinating conjunction linking the two predicate adjectives.
Predicate adjective coordinated with ‘klein’.

sentences.target: Sie spart für den Haushalt ein bisschen Geld.
sentences.reading: /ziː ʃpaʁt fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈhaʊ̯s.halt aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən ɡɛlt/

translations.de: Sie spart für den Haushalt ein bisschen Geld.
translations.ipa: /ziː ʃpaʁt fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈhaʊ̯s.halt aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən ɡɛlt/
translations.en: She saves a little money for the household.
translations.es: Ella ahorra un poco de dinero para la casa.
translations.fr: Elle met de côté un peu d'argent pour la maison.
translations.it: Mette da parte un po' di soldi per la casa.
translations.ko: 그녀는 집안에 쓰려고 돈을 조금 모아요.
translations.ru: Она откладывает немного денег на хозяйство.
translations.pt: Ela guarda um pouco de dinheiro para a casa.
translations.vi: Cô ấy để dành một ít tiền cho việc nhà.
translations.ar: هي تدخر قليلًا من المال للبيت.
translations.nl: Ze zet wat geld opzij voor het huishouden.
translations.uk: Вона відкладає трохи грошей на господарство.
translations.hu: Félretesz egy kis pénzt a háztartásra.
translations.hi: वह घर के लिए थोड़ा पैसा बचाती है.
translations.pl: Ona odkłada trochę pieniędzy na dom.
translations.el: Βάζει στην άκρη λίγα χρήματα για το σπίτι.
translations.nb: Hun legger litt penger til side til husholdningen.
translations.id: Dia menabung sedikit uang untuk rumah tangga.
translations.sv: Hon lägger undan lite pengar till hushållet.
translations.ro: Ea pune deoparte un pic de bani pentru casă.
translations.da: Hun lægger lidt penge til side til husholdningen.
translations.ja: 彼女は家のために少しお金を貯めています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine agreeing with ‘Haushalt’.
Masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘für’ (accusative).
Indefinite article; part of the quantifier expression ‘ein bisschen’.
Quantifier noun in the fixed measure expression ‘ein bisschen’.
Neuter noun; direct object of ‘spart’, quantified by ‘ein bisschen’.

sentences.target: Wir machen den Haushalt am Wochenende.

translations.de: Wir machen den Haushalt am Wochenende.
translations.en: We do the housework on the weekend.
translations.es: Hacemos las tareas de la casa el fin de semana.
translations.fr: On fait le ménage le week-end.
translations.it: Facciamo le faccende di casa nel fine settimana.
translations.pt: Fazemos as tarefas de casa no fim de semana.
translations.he: אנחנו עושים את עבודות הבית בסוף השבוע.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần chúng tôi làm việc nhà.
translations.ar: نقوم بأعمال المنزل في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: In het weekend doen we het huishouden.
translations.uk: Ми робимо хатні справи на вихідних.
translations.hi: हम सप्ताहांत पर घर के काम करते हैं.
translations.el: Κάνουμε τις δουλειές του σπιτιού το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.id: Kami mengerjakan pekerjaan rumah tangga saat akhir pekan.

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present indicative; main predicate; collocates with ‘den Haushalt’.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine with ‘Haushalt’.
Masculine noun; direct object in the idiomatic phrase ‘den Haushalt machen’.
Contracted preposition + definite article (‘an dem’); introduces a dative temporal phrase.
Neuter noun; dative singular after ‘am’, functioning as a temporal adverbial.
